title: Documents
description: Upload and manage project documents for agent context.
selectProject: Select a project from the Dashboard to manage documents.
uploadDescription: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse.
uploadHint: Supported: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint (max 50 MB)
noDocumentsHint: Upload your first document to provide context for agents.
deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its parsed content. This action cannot be undone.
invalidFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload PDF, Word, Excel, or PowerPoint files.
